uplink._note: Upstream decodes only the first 3 bytes; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Temperature 30.1, RelativeHumidity 42.3) and mapped onto air.temperature / air.relativeHumidity.
In-bounds synthetic; expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Temperature 22.5, RelativeHumidity 55).
In-bounds synthetic exercising the upper nibble packing; expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Temperature 40.9, RelativeHumidity 99).

uplink.description: Payload length not a multiple of 3 returns an error

errors: payload length must be a non-zero multiple of 3 bytes

uplink._note: Upstream returns null for non-multiple-of-3 payloads; we surface it as an error instead of emitting null data.
